overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sunlit medieval fantasy village with cobblestone paths, a central pond, wooden structures, and Mediterranean-style vegetation. The character explores the village center, passes under a wooden shelter with a horse, approaches a distinctive blue cottage, and continues past a stone arcade building with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: village pond area with cobblestone paths

events.description: character steps from dry cobblestone into shallow water and mud
moving from pond area into village center square

agents.ego_description: walking along cobblestone path near pond, heading toward village center

notable_agents.action: child running ahead on the path toward the village center

entered.detail: shallow murky water with stone edges along the path
rustic wooden post fence lining the path
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the village edge
cluster of medieval village buildings with tiled roofs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a village pond with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path. The area is open and sunlit with moderate vegetation including cypress trees and flowering bushes. A child runs ahead on the path as the character steps through shallow water, transitioning from the natural pond area toward the built village center.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with wooden market shelter and horse tethering area

events.description: passing under wooden shelter structure creating partial shade
slight turn toward the blue house direction while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through village square, passing wooden shelter with tethered horse and cart

notable_agents.action: horse standing tethered under wooden shelter next to cart

entered.detail: open-air wooden pavilion with slanted roof used for market or shelter
brown horse harnessed to wooden cart parked under shelter
small vibrant blue cottage with stone foundation visible in distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the village square dominated by a large wooden shelter. A horse and cart are stationed under the structure. The ground is cobblestone mixed with dirt. The blue cottage becomes visible in the distance as the character moves through the square, passing villagers and approaching the shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: path leading to isolated blue cottage with garden

events.description: ascending stone steps toward blue cottage entrance
turning around to head back toward village center

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps to blue house, then turning around to return to main path

entered.detail: vibrant turquoise blue cottage with stone foundation, wooden door, and mossy roof
weathered stone staircase leading up to cottage entrance
rustic scarecrow with hat standing in garden beside path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the village square and approaches a distinctive bright blue cottage surrounded by dense vegetation and flowers. After ascending the stone steps to the cottage entrance, Geralt turns around and heads back toward the main village path, passing a wooden scarecrow in the garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with stone arcade building and notice boards

events.description: approaching stone building with arched colonnade where NPCs gather
passing group of villagers standing under stone arches

agents.ego_description: walking past stone building with NPCs gathered under arches, continuing down cobblestone path

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing and conversing under stone arcade
dog walking across the cobblestone path

entered.detail: stone building with arched colonnade and dark interior openings
wooden barrels with posted notices and signs along the path
distant stone archway marking village exit or entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt returns to the main village street and passes a stone building with arched openings where several NPCs are gathered. A dog crosses the path ahead. The character continues along the cobblestone road past wooden notice boards and barrels, heading toward a distant stone archway with mountains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval village, transitioning from a natural pond area into the heart of a bustling residential center. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path beside a pond, stepping through shallow water as a child runs ahead toward the village square. As the camera moves forward, the open landscape shifts into a built environment dominated by a large wooden shelter with a horse and cart, eventually leading toward a distinctive bright blue cottage nestled among dense flowers. After ascending the cottage steps and turning back past a garden scarecrow, the scene expands onto the main village street where the character passes a stone arcade filled with NPCs and a crossing dog. The movement finally carries the camera past wooden notice boards and barrels along the cobblestone road toward a distant stone archway with mountains visible on the horizon.
